prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they were GREEN or RED. Did being GREEN or RED make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did color matter to the fertility of reptiles?

prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they exhibited a LIGHT or DARK version of their color. Did being LIGHT or DARK make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature until now, or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did brightness matter to the fertility of reptiles?

prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they had ROUND feet or POINTY, CURLY feet. Did having CURLY/POINTY or ROUND feet make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did foot shape matter to the fertility of reptiles?

feedback_text.text: I encountered an issue when hitting the "Shift" key when I began to type.  If my finger was too close to the "Enter" key, it was registering as my having hit the "Continue" button, which was not my intention.  I believe this happened on four occasions, so my "reason" was missing on these four entries.  I did find it confusing that it was not made more clear that participants were supposed to be focusing on physical characteristics when giving reasons.  I was coming up with things based on certain colors, but also why someone's fertility may have been higher or lower in general, not having anything to do with appearance.  Maybe I'm the only one who found it confusing (it's been a long day).  Good luck with your research!
